pluses: Vigour of the Edain — hardy and hale (12 hearts; base Men have no innate stats, so all of this is the Edain's own)
Valour of Men — a stronger blow (+15% melee damage, and it stacks with Strength potions)
Tall of Númenor — longer reach in the strike and at the work-bench
Wayfarer — sure on any ground: unhindered by soul-sand, honey or mud, never slips on ice, and quick upon the road
Ambition of the Secondborn — learns every craft the swifter
Last Stand — below a third of health, desperate valour ERUPTS: DOUBLE melee damage (+100%, stacking), Strength, Resistance II, and Speed II until you climb back above a third
minuses: The Doom of Men — no ancient gift shields you from fire, dark, or dread
Tires without rest — wearies after long without sleep
